item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡航运延误推高油价，燃油价格随之上涨
item.description: 周一燃料价格飙升——柴油涨幅超过原油——因中东战事扩大，可能导致波斯湾炼油厂出口中断。【原文：Fuel prices jumped on Monday — with diesel surging more than crude oil — as the widening war in the Middle East threatened to disrupt exports from Persian Gulf refineries.】

item.title: 亚马逊云服务因"物体"撞击阿联酋数据中心而中断
item.description: 亚马逊网络服务公司（Amazon Web Services Inc.）因不明物体撞击其位于阿拉伯联合酋长国的一处数据中心引发火灾，导致服务中断。【原文：Amazon Web Services Inc. suffered a disruption to its services after unidentified objects struck one of its data centers in the United Arab Emirates, causing a fire.】

item.title: 吉利扩大对比亚迪的领先优势，创2022年以来最大销量差距
item.description: 中国汽车制造商吉利汽车控股有限公司连续第二个月销量超越比亚迪股份有限公司，给后者带来压力，迫使其加强产品阵容，重燃电动汽车需求疲软的局面。【原文：Chinese automaker Geely Automobile Holdings Ltd. sold more vehicles than BYD Co. for a second consecutive month, piling pressure on the latter to beef up its lineup and reignite waning demand for electric vehicles.】

item.title: 油价不会等待政权更迭的明朗化
item.description:
战争持续时间越长，发生全面崩溃的风险就越大。 

【原文：

The longer a shooting war continues, the greater the risk of an outright shock. 

】

item.title: 印度股市因中东冲突抹去美印贸易协议带来的涨幅
item.description: 印度股市周一大幅下挫，跟随亚洲多数市场下跌，因中东局势升级打击了投资者信心。【原文：Indian equities tumbled on Monday, tracking declines across most Asian peers, as escalating conflict in the Middle East dented investor sentiment.】

item.title: 中国科技股指数暴跌25%后闪现看跌信号
item.description: 恒生科技指数已跌破关键支撑线，鉴于地缘政治紧张局势和持续的盈利担忧，这预示着未来可能出现更多抛售。【原文：The Hang Seng Tech Index has slipped beneath a crucial support line that suggests more selloffs ahead given geopolitical tensions and lingering earnings worries.】

item.title: 任天堂股价下跌，因担忧中东地区运输成本上升
item.description: 任天堂公司股价创近一个月最大跌幅，因市场担忧美以对伊朗发动袭击后货运路线变更，可能推高运往欧洲的Switch 2游戏主机物流成本。【原文：Nintendo Co.’s shares fell the most in almost a month, hurt by fears that rerouted shipments in the wake of US-Israeli strikes on Iran may drive up logistics costs for Europe-bound Switch 2 consoles.】

item.title: 日本央行副行长未暗示3月加息
item.description: 日本央行副行长日比野亮三未透露任何明确信号暗示即将加息，这强化了金融市场的预期——在周末中东爆发冲突后，日本央行本月将维持利率不变。【原文：Bank of Japan Deputy Governor Ryozo Himino refrained from dropping any clear hints pointing to an imminent interest rate increase, reinforcing financial market expectations that authorities will stand pat this month after a conflict erupted in the Middle East over the weekend.】

item.title: 伊朗遭袭后原油价格反弹，豆油价格触及两年高点
item.description: 大豆油价格跃升至逾两年高位，跟随原油价格上涨，此前美国和以色列周末对伊朗发动了袭击。【原文：Soybean oil jumped to the highest level in more than two years, tracking crude prices higher after strikes by the US and Israel on Iran over the weekend.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突引发油价飙升，恐对印度卢比及股市造成新一轮冲击
item.description: 航空、涂料、轮胎和特种化学品等行业可能面临压力。【原文：Sectors such as aviation, paints, tires, and specialty chemicals may come under pressure.】

item.title: 日本自民党总裁警告：人工智能或将扩大低收入群体规模
item.description: 一位关注技术影响的新兴反对党领袖表示，人工智能可能颠覆日本劳动力市场，并使依靠低收入维持生计的人群规模扩大，这需要有针对性的政策支持。【原文：Artificial intelligence could upend Japan’s labor market and swell the ranks of those subsisting on low incomes, creating the need for targeted policy support, the leader of an upstart opposition party focused on the implications of technology said.】

item.title: 印尼央行出手干预，伊朗危机冲击印尼盾汇率
item.description: 印度尼西亚央行表示，由于美以战争削弱了市场对印尼盾的信心，该行正对外汇市场进行干预。【原文：Indonesia’s central bank said it is intervening in the foreign-exchange markets as the US-Israeli war sapped sentiment for the currency.】

item.title: 英伟达支持的人工智能初创公司Firmus在IPO前签署新合同
item.description: 澳大利亚人工智能初创企业Firmus Technologies Pty.与一家全球科技公司就墨尔本新建数据中心签署新协议，该公司正为今年晚些时候的预期上市做准备。【原文：Australian artificial-intelligence startup Firmus Technologies Pty. has signed a new agreement with a global technology firm for a new data center in Melbourne, as the company prepares for an expected public listing later this year.】

item.title: 新兴市场货币与股市因伊朗冲突担忧而下跌
item.description: 周一亚洲交易时段，新兴市场货币和股市普遍下跌，因对伊朗冲突的担忧及油价飙升打压了风险资产的投资情绪。【原文：Emerging-market currencies and stocks slumped in Asia trading on Monday as worries over Iran conflict and surging oil prices weigh on sentiment for risky assets.】

item.title: 美国国债小幅走低，交易员暂缓避险资产买盘
item.description: 美国国债收益率曲线全面走低，因美伊双方释放的和解信号削弱了避险资产需求。【原文：Treasuries pushed lower across the curve as reports of conciliatory messages from both the US and Iran damped demand for haven assets.】

item.title: 日本谴责伊朗核计划，对美国袭击保持沉默
item.description: 日本首相高市早苗在措辞谨慎的回应中谴责了伊朗的核计划，但未就东京是否支持华盛顿对德黑兰的打击发表评论。【原文：Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi condemned Iran’s nuclear program in a carefully worded response that avoided commenting on whether Tokyo supported Washington’s strike on Tehran.】

item.title: 油价上涨威胁田口政子的议程，Monex的科尔如是说
item.description: 据Monex集团分析师杰斯珀·科尔指出，油价上涨可能给日本带来新一轮通胀冲击，这将使首相高市早苗缓解民生成本压力的努力面临更大挑战。【原文：Rising oil prices risk delivering a fresh inflation shock to Japan, complicating Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s efforts to ease cost-of-living pressures, according to Monex Group’s Jesper Koll.】

item.title: 中国白酒龙头五粮液称董事长被拘留
item.description: 中国一家顶级白酒企业董事长已被当地警方拘留，该公司表示，这给本已因需求疲软而举步维艰的中国白酒行业再添打击。【原文：The chairman of one of China’s top liquor makers has been placed under detention by local authorities, the company said, dealing another blow to a Chinese baijiu industry already struggling with sagging demand.】

item.title: 澳大利亚液化天然气股价飙升，伊朗危机阻碍全球供应
item.description: 澳大利亚液化天然气出口商的股价飙升，此前油轮停止穿越霍尔木兹海峡，导致全球约五分之一的供应受阻，并可能推高燃料价格。【原文：Shares in Australian liquefied natural gas exporters surged after tankers stopped crossing the Strait of Hormuz, hampering about a fifth of global supply and threatening to raise prices of the fuel.】

item.title: 铝价上涨，因中东战争威胁供应中断
item.description: 铝价上涨源于市场担忧中东地区冲突将扰乱关键供应路线，该地区贡献了全球铝产量的重要份额。【原文：Aluminum climbed on concerns that critical supply routes for Middle Eastern producers will be disrupted by conflict in a region responsible for a significant chunk of global output.】

item.title: 分析师称霍尔木兹海峡延误可能推高油价
item.description: 布伦特原油周一开盘时一度飙升13%，突破每桶82美元大关。当前油市正为霍尔木兹海峡持续动荡及长期供应中断做好准备。【原文：Brent jumped by as much as 13% to above $82 a barrel at the open on Monday, and oil markets are now bracing for prolonged volatility and sustained disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 法国兴业银行聘请瑞银集团张先生领导亚太区股权资本市场业务
item.description: 法国兴业银行任命张思琳为亚太区股权资本市场主管，该法国银行正寻求加强其在股票销售咨询业务方面的实力。【原文：Societe Generale SA has appointed Selina Cheung as head of equity capital markets in Asia Pacific, as the French lender looks to bolster its business advising on share sales.】

item.title: 经济学家评估中东战争冲击，中国被视为受损方之一
item.description: 过去一年间，经济学家们一直在模拟美国总统唐纳德·特朗普混乱的贸易战可能带来的影响。如今，他们评估的是一场真实的贸易战。【原文：For the past year, economists have modeled the impact of US President Donald Trump’s chaotic trade war. Now, it’s a real war they’re assessing.】

item.title: 分析师称澳元将乘势而上，在看涨押注中再创佳绩
item.description: 策略师表示，澳元兑美元汇率仍有进一步上涨空间，尽管该货币的投机性看涨押注仍处于逾八年来的最高水平附近。【原文：The Australian dollar has scope to extend its advance versus the greenback, strategists say, even as speculative bullish bets on the currency stay near the highest level in more than eight years.】

item.title: 更多液化天然气运输船绕开霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗危机持续升级
item.description: 计划在卡塔尔或阿联酋装载液化天然气的油轮似乎正暂时放弃这些计划，因为大多数船东和贸易商都避开了霍尔木兹海峡。【原文：Liquefied natural gas tankers set to load shipments in Qatar or the United Arab Emirates appear to be temporarily abandoning those plans, as most shipowners and traders avoid the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 中国五年计划将着力解决大宗商品供应问题
item.description: 中国领导人本周将启动一项关键的五年规划，该规划将对本十年末前的全球大宗商品市场产生深远影响。其针对供给端的调整措施，其重要性不亚于其需求端决策所产生的影响。【原文：Chinese leaders will launch a pivotal five-year plan this week that’ll help shape global commodities markets through the end of the decade. Their fixes targeting supply will be as important as the impact of their decisions on demand.】

item.title: 伊朗袭击事件揭示预测市场时代的黑暗边界案例
item.description: 预测市场过去一年来一直以雄心勃勃的宣传吸引华尔街资金和华盛顿的认可：允许人们对现实世界事件下注的市场，能比任何替代方案更快地提供更优质的信息。【原文：Prediction markets have spent the past year courting Wall Street money and Washington legitimacy with an ambitious pitch: markets that let people bet on real-world events can produce better, faster information than any alternative.】

item.title: 日本股市下跌，伊朗危机与油价飙升削弱风险偏好
item.description: 东京股市早盘下跌，因美以对伊朗的打击打击了风险偏好，推高了油价。【原文：Japanese shares dropped in early Tokyo trading after US-Israeli strikes on Iran hit risk appetite and pushed oil prices higher.】

item.title: 高盛称霍尔木兹海峡中断或致欧洲天然气价格飙升130%
item.description: 高盛集团表示，若霍尔木兹海峡航运中断一个月，欧洲天然气价格可能翻倍以上。【原文：European natural gas prices could more than double if shipping through the Strait of Hormuz is halted for one month, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.】

item.title: 金价攀升，中东战事引发投资者避险热潮
item.description: 金价上涨，因中东战事动荡市场，投资者纷纷涌向更安全的资产。【原文：Gold rose, as war in the Middle East rattled markets and sent investors flocking to safer assets.】
